# IGY6 Rooted

> Veteran-owned tree service in Niceville, Destin, and Fort Walton Beach, FL. Tree removal, stump grinding, trimming, pruning, 24/7 emergency response, land and lot clearing.

IGY6 Rooted is a USAF-veteran-owned tree service company serving Northwest Florida. We provide free written estimates, are fully insured, and respond 24/7 to storm and emergency calls.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, service area, and free-estimate CTA.
- [About](/about): Founder Craig Orner (USAF Reservist) and the IGY6 Rooted story.
- [Services](/services): Full catalog of tree, stump, and land services.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email, hours, and embedded request form.
- [Free Estimate](/free-estimate): Online request form for a free written estimate.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on tree care, storm prep, and Florida-specific guidance.

## Services

- [Tree Removal](/services/tree-removal)
- [Tree Trimming](/services/tree-trimming)
- [Tree Pruning](/services/tree-pruning)

- [Lot Clearing](/services/lot-clearing)
- [Brush Removal](/services/brush-removal)
- [Lawn Care](/services/lawn-care)
- [Property Maintenance](/services/property-maintenance)
